evals.prompt: Run the completion gate for the login-page task in the test-benchmark project. The task was completed by frontend-worker. Changed files: src/pages/login/LoginPage.tsx, src/components/auth/OAuthButton.tsx, src/components/auth/LoginForm.tsx. Dev config is at .ai/projects/test-benchmark/dev/dev-config.yml (build: pnpm build, lint: pnpm lint, test_related: pnpm test --findRelatedTests). Project state is at .ai/projects/test-benchmark/state.yml. Record gate results in the execution log.
evals.expected_output: Gate check attempts for build, lint, and test_related commands against the login-page task's changed files, with results recorded.
expectations: Reads dev-config.yml to get the correct build, lint, and test commands
Identifies the login-page task's changed files from project state
Attempts to run or references the build command (pnpm build)

evals.prompt: The rbac-system task failed its lint check on the first attempt — there's an unused import in src/middleware/rbac.ts. This is retry 1 of max 2. The dev config commands are at .ai/projects/test-benchmark/dev/dev-config.yml. Re-run the completion gate after the agent's fix. If it still fails, log to project-state.yml errors array.
evals.expected_output: Re-run gate check for the rbac-system task. If passing, record success. If still failing after 2 retries, escalate.
expectations: Tracks that this is retry 1 of max 2 retries
References the correct lint command from dev-config.yml
Describes escalation path if max retries exceeded (escalate to code-review)

evals.prompt: Wave 1 is complete for test-benchmark. Both oauth-provider-setup and session-management tasks passed their individual gates. Run the full test suite at the wave boundary before dispatching wave 2. Dev config: .ai/projects/test-benchmark/dev/dev-config.yml. Project state: .ai/projects/test-benchmark/state.yml.
evals.expected_output: Full test suite run at wave boundary, verifying wave 1 integrity before wave 2 dispatch.
expectations: Distinguishes between per-task test_related and full test suite at wave boundary
References the full test command (pnpm test) for wave boundary check
Verifies both wave 1 tasks have passing gate results before running full suite
